claim_error_rules.message: Claim has non-related op with main op code
claim_error_rules.meaning: One or more operation codes on the claim do not relate properly to the main operation code.
recommended_fix_steps: Review the main OP code first.
Review every related OP code line for logical relation to the main OP.
Confirm the causal part supports the selected main repair.
Remove unrelated labor lines if they are not allowed with the main op code.
Resubmit after OP code structure is corrected.

claim_error_rules.message: *TT opcode not allowed as main OP
claim_error_rules.meaning: A TT operation code cannot be used as the main operation code on the claim.
recommended_fix_steps: Identify the correct primary OP code for the repair.
Use the TT code only in an allowed supporting position if Hyundai policy permits it.
Confirm the labor operation structure matches the claim type.
Resubmit after replacing the invalid main OP.

claim_error_rules.message: Op Code not applicable to Causal Part
claim_error_rules.meaning: The selected operation code does not align with the causal part entered on the claim.
recommended_fix_steps: Verify the causal part number.
Verify the selected OP code.
Check Hyundai labor applicability for that part and repair.
Correct either the causal part or the labor operation.

claim_error_rules.meaning: The entered operation code is not valid in the current claim context.
recommended_fix_steps: Check for typing or formatting error in the OP code.
Confirm the code is valid for the selected claim type.
Confirm the code is valid for the vehicle / repair / campaign context.
Replace the invalid code and resubmit.

claim_error_rules.message: Claim returned and held for correction
claim_error_rules.meaning: The claim was not accepted as submitted and must be corrected and resubmitted.
recommended_fix_steps: Read the return code and message first.
Review the affected section of the claim screen.
Check whether a dealer reply is required.
Correct the specific field, labor line, or attachment issue.
Resubmit only after validating the corrected claim.
